name: alistore-erp
description: AliStore — операционная система для розничной торговли электроникой (КР)

scripts.ios:build: cd apps/ios && DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer xcodebuild -project AliStoreNative.xcodeproj -alltargets -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug -arch arm64 ONLY_ACTIVE_ARCH=YES CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.ios:test: cd apps/ios && DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer xcodebuild test -project AliStoreNative.xcodeproj -scheme AliStoreClient -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro' CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO
scripts.launch:check: npm run launch:preflight:strict && npm run launch:readiness:strict
